architecture.title: Architecture Highlights
architecture.item1: Event-driven ingestion and processing pipeline with strict tenant boundaries.
architecture.item2: Timeseries storage and query model designed for low-latency operational dashboards.
architecture.item3: Fault-tolerant processing with replay support for deterministic incident recovery.
architecture.item4: API and integration layer prepared for secure enterprise extensions.

architecture.title: Architecture Highlights
architecture.item1: Medallion data model with explicit Bronze, Silver, and Gold responsibilities.
architecture.item2: Schema and quality contracts with quarantine flow for invalid records.
architecture.item3: Deterministic local orchestration for reproducible demos and validation.
architecture.item4: Operational metadata for traceable run windows and outputs.

delivery.title: Delivery Focus
